prompt_text: Suggest ways to improve physical health.
response_text:
# Ways to Improve Physical Health

## Exercise & Movement
- Aim for 150 minutes of moderate activity weekly (brisk walking, cycling, swimming)
- Add strength training 2+ days per week
- Incorporate stretching and flexibility work
- Take short movement breaks throughout the day

## Nutrition
- Eat plenty of vegetables, fruits, whole grains, and lean proteins
- Limit processed foods, added sugars, and excess sodium
- Stay hydrated with water
- Practice portion control

## Sleep
- Aim for 7-9 hours nightly
- Maintain a consistent sleep schedule
- Create a dark, cool, quiet bedroom

## Stress Management
- Try meditation, yoga, or deep breathing
- Spend time in nature
- Pursue hobbies and social connections
- Consider therapy if needed

## Preventive Care
- Get regular check-ups and screenings
- Keep vaccinations current
- Practice good hygiene

## Habits to Reduce
- Limit alcohol consumption
- Avoid smoking and vaping
- Reduce screen time before bed

## Small Steps
Start with one or two changes rather than overhauling everything at once—sustainable progress beats dramatic overhauls.

**What area interests you most?** I can offer more specific guidance.
